claims: Legacy 21-case ManualReplay plus two restore processes remain mandatory after the 117-case import contract matrix. Every contract case is applied, compiled and saved, verified after a fresh UE process, reapplied with semantic no-duplicate verification, then verified after a second fresh UE process before cleanup.

cases.assertion: executable BeginPlay → Sequence → Branch flow plus typed MakeArray/GetArrayItem and persisted member containers

canonical MakeStruct/BreakStruct pins, connected SetFields, literal/linked GetDataTableRow persistence, and schema-native DataTable object storage (`DefaultObject` with empty `DefaultValue`) after fresh reopen
enum comparisons, switch and utility nodes

contextual BeginPlay/key flow plus schema-native scalar/struct/class defaults, linked MakeTransform -> SpawnActor compile/save/reopen, incompatible class rejection, malformed Rotator rejection, and unlinked SpawnTransform rejection
same-patch handler function creation, canonical CreateDelegate.OutputDelegate links, legacy Delegate alias compatibility, dispatcher operations, compile/save/reopen, and ComponentBoundEvent
impure/pure internal Entry-to-Result exec and multiple results
DoOnce/ForLoop/ForEachLoop durable identities
macro/collapsed Tunnel/Composite identity, schema-native unlinked boundary-pin defaults, repeat import without duplicates, save/unload/fresh reopen
Widget Blueprint parent and CreateWidget/event nodes
AIController Blueprint parent and contextual event
BTTask_BlueprintBase class-specific Blueprint round trip
BTService_BlueprintBase class-specific Blueprint round trip
BTDecorator_BlueprintBase class-specific Blueprint round trip
strict rejection before transaction
transient sandbox rejects a missing pin before target mutation, then canonical Knot InputPin/OutputPin connections compile and save
test-only post-mutation fault, real editor Undo
before/after structural snapshot hash equality
structured guard/rollback diagnostics map to readable text
four registered command contracts
raw uint8 has no UEnum subtype and keeps default 37
assertions: Rotator member default is canonicalized through UE4.27 UScriptStruct ImportText/ExportText
Rotator default compiles, saves, reopens in a fresh process and exports non-empty canonical text
malformed struct member default is rejected before mutation with member_default_import_text_invalid

cases.assertion: enum-backed byte requires resolvable UEnum
mutate/save target and queue baseline .uasset for startup-only restore
new UE process startup applies manifest before asset reopen and verifies bytes/compile
